Ingredients: Spaghetti, Eggs, Pecorino Romano, Guanciale, Black Pepper
Instructions: Boil pasta. Fry guanciale. Whisk eggs and cheese. Combine all off heat.

Ingredients: Eggs, Butter, Salt, Pepper, Cheddar Cheese
Instructions: Whisk eggs. Melt butter in pan. Pour eggs and cook gently. Add cheese and fold.

Ingredients: Chicken Breast, Broccoli, Soy Sauce, Garlic, Ginger, Sesame Oil
Instructions: Slice chicken and veggies. Sear chicken in hot wok. Add vegetables and sauce. Toss until cooked.

Ingredients: Beef Tenderloin, Mushroom Duxelles, Prosciutto, Puff Pastry, Egg Wash
Instructions: Sear beef. Wrap in prosciutto and duxelles. Wrap in pastry. Bake until golden.

Ingredients: Sourdough Bread, Avocado, Lemon Juice, Red Pepper Flakes, Salt
Instructions: Toast the bread. Mash avocado with lemon juice and salt. Spread on toast and garnish.

Ingredients: Pizza Dough, San Marzano Tomatoes, Fresh Mozzarella, Basil, Olive Oil
Instructions: Roll out dough. Spread crushed tomatoes. Add mozzarella. Bake at high heat. Top with basil.

Ingredients: Yellow Onions, Beef Broth, Gruyere Cheese, Baguette, Butter, Thyme
Instructions: Slice and caramelize onions slowly. Add broth and simmer. Top with toasted bread and cheese. Broil.

Ingredients: Flour, Butter, Brown Sugar, Eggs, Chocolate Chips, Vanilla
Instructions: Cream butter and sugars. Mix in wet ingredients then dry. Fold in chips. Bake at 180°C.

Ingredients: Basmati Rice, Chicken, Yogurt, Onions, Garam Masala, Saffron
Instructions: Marinate chicken. Parboil rice. Layer chicken and rice in pot. Infuse saffron. Cook on low heat.

Ingredients: Bananas, Strawberries, Blueberries, Greek Yogurt, Honey, Milk
Instructions: Place all ingredients into a high-speed blender. Blend until completely smooth.
